title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Reckitt India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Reckitt India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Reckitt India has an exciting opening for a Process Engineer at our Raipur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Reckitt India:
Reckitt India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in GD&T

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Reckitt India!
